flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Williamsburg Technical College rose 34% between 2006 and 2009 (17.5% → 23.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Williamsburg Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (390 → 448).
